suite.name: suite S1779456233379 1

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Successful Login With Valid Credentials
test.doc: Verify that user can login with valid credentials 'tomsmith' and 'SuperSecretPassword!' on login page
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${BASE_URL}' not found.

test.name: TC_002 Login Attempt With Invalid Password
test.doc: Verify that login fails when entering username 'tomsmith' with incorrect password 'WrongPassword'
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${BASE_URL}' not found.

test.name: TC_003 Login Attempt With Invalid Username
test.doc: Verify that login fails when entering incorrect username 'wronguser' with correct password 'SuperSecretPassword!'
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: Variable '${BASE_URL}' not found.

suite.status: Suite setup failed: Variable '${BASE_URL}' not found.
